allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img=Image.open\('assets/icon.png'\); print\(f'{img.size[0]}x{img.size[1]}'\)")
Bash(node -e "try { const k = require\('keytar'\); console.log\('keytar loaded:', typeof k\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('keytar NOT available:', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('name:', pkg.name\); console.log\('productName:', pkg.productName || 'not set'\);")
